parsed_review.summary: CP00-347 (Risk B, 40 units, RP11.P04.M03.S06-RP11.P04.M05.S05) is a clean descriptor-only Time Expense Core UI workflow slice pack that does not over-claim. The pack-level claim is production_ready:false / runtime_ready:false / status implemented_pending_review, which is fully supported by the evidence: (1) Coverage — units split M03=15/M04=20/M05=5 and the deliverable distribution {claude_review:4, ui:16, security_audit:4, implementation:10, fixture:2, test:2, hermes_evidence:2}=40 reconcile exactly across baseline, manifest, requirements, contract, and plan (hand-verified per-unit). (2) Implementation — registry.js/service.js/validators.js extend the locked CP342-346 pattern; all outputs are Object.freeze'd; freezeCp347Result and CP347_NO_WRITE_ATTESTATION assert no_real_data:true, writes_product_state:false, and the full no-runtime/no-leak flag set; required exports flow through index.js wildcard re-exports. (3) Tests/validation — model.test.js covers coverage, descriptor-only rows, and authority boundaries; validate-rp11-time-expense-core-contract.mjs pins contract JSON to generated descriptors via assert.deepEqual; command-evidence.json records npm test and rp11:time-expense-core:validate at exit 0. (4) Boundaries — claude_is_final_approval:false and local_validation_claims_enterprise_trust:false throughout; Hermes is descriptor-only (emits_hermes_runtime_receipt:false), not embedded in product runtime, used only for deterministic review packet/receipt handling. (5) Review hardening (CP178+) — readiness auth-preflight passed (exit 0, 1436-byte valid-JSON stdout, not 0-byte/malformed/fenced/tool-shaped); summary_only_review_allowed:false correctly enforced for Risk B with security/review deliverables; forbidden_tools_present:false; pack_level_claude_review status pending with no invalid attempts smuggled as valid; post-review artifacts correctly absent at this step; the unrelated LDIP c-ldip-01-invalid-attempt-01.json is properly scoped out. Claude remains a read-only independent reviewer and not final approval authority. No P0/P1/P2/P3 findings.
